query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A square-format black and white photograph in which a bright, irregularly shaped mass occupies the upper-central portion, surrounded by expansive darkness. Within the illuminated area, intermingling tones of white and gray form shapes that suggest facial profiles, flowing hair, or organic textures. Small points of light appear scattered across the lower portion of the frame beneath the central illumination.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A square black and white photograph dominated by extreme underexposure that buries nearly the entire frame in crushed blackness, isolating a single blurred and brightly lit central form in the upper portion. Intentional soft focus and a deliberate absence of fine detail render the subject's textures smeared and indistinct, dissolving facial, figurative, or environmental elements into ambiguity. The image functions as an abstract composition that abandons representational clarity to evoke dread and unease through floating highlights and ghostly gray shapes suspended in an oppressive void.
